highlights.description: Spec-Driven Development Evaluation CLI using LLM-as-a-Judge
Built-in support for Kiro (AWS), SpecKit (GitHub), and PlexusOne SDD methodologies
Multi-provider LLM support via OmniLLM: Anthropic, OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Google Gemini

added.description: SDD type system with YAML frontmatter and markdown body definitions
Type inheritance via `extends` field for extending built-in types
Resolver loads types from project-local, user-global, or built-in sources
Embedded definitions using `go:embed` for zero-configuration startup
Kiro SDD type: three-phase workflow with EARS format (requirements, design, tasks)
SpecKit SDD type: outcome-focused specifications (constitution, spec, plan, tasks)
PlexusOne SDD type: enterprise methodology (MRD, PRD, TRD, PLAN, TASKS)
`check` command: detect SDD type in directory with confidence scoring
`validate` command: validate spec structure against SDD type requirements
`init` command: scaffold spec files for a chosen SDD type
`info` command: get detailed SDD type information for coding assistants
`rubrics` command: get evaluation rubrics (GO/WARN/NO-GO criteria)
`evaluate` command: LLM-powered evaluation using LLM-as-a-Judge
`version` command: display version information
Two evaluation modes: standard (prompt-based) and tool-based with codebase access
Per-criterion scoring with weighted aggregation
Status aggregation: NO-GO > WARN > GO
Dry-run mode for testing evaluation prompts
Multi-provider LLM client via OmniLLM (Anthropic, OpenAI, Bedrock, Gemini)
LLM tool loop with max 10 iterations for complex evaluations
`devspec_check` LLM tool: detect SDD type
`devspec_validate` LLM tool: validate structure
`devspec_info` LLM tool: get SDD type info
`devspec_rubrics` LLM tool: get evaluation rubrics
`read_file` LLM tool: read file contents with 50KB limit and path security
`glob_files` LLM tool: find files by pattern with path sandboxing
TOON output format (default): ~40% fewer tokens than JSON
JSON output format with 2-space indentation
JSON-compact output format for APIs
Text output format: human-readable with status indicators
Markdown output format: documentation-ready with tables
Detection package for auto-detecting SDD type from directory structure
Validation package for deterministic structure checking (no LLM required)
Scaffold package for generating template files from SDD definitions
Report generation with multi-agent-spec TeamReport conversion

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Getting started guides: installation, quickstart, concepts
SDD type documentation for Kiro, SpecKit, and PlexusOne
Extensibility guides: custom types, extending built-ins, rubric format
Deployment guides: coding assistants, CI/CD, service deployment
README with installation, quick start, and usage examples

dependencies.description: github.com/plexusone/omnillm v0.15.1 for multi-provider LLM support
